name: State Grid Corporation of China | openEuler
description: Smooth OS Porting for CHD Wuhu Power Plant's Distributed Control System

headline: Smooth OS Porting for CHD Wuhu Power Plant's Distributed Control System
description: China Huadian Corporation (CHD) built a next-generation Distributed Control System (DCS) using openEuler-based OS, Phytium processors, China Great Wall servers, and Dameng databases, deployed at CHD Wuhu Power Plant as the first innovative core control system in China's high-parameter large-capacity power generation field.

about.name: Distributed Control System
about.description: Next-generation DCS built by China Huadian Corporation for power generation industrial control

about.name: Industrial Control
about.description: Security of core information infrastructure in the industrial control field for power generation

name: CHD Wuhu Power Plant Distributed Control System
description: A next-generation Distributed Control System (DCS) for the CHD Wuhu Power Plant built using Phytium processors, China Great Wall servers, Galaxy Kylin Advanced Server Operating System V10, Dameng databases, and CHD DCS platform software.
operatingSystem: Galaxy Kylin Advanced Server Operating System V10
featureList: Strategic cooperation between China Electronics Information Industry Group and CHD
First innovative core control system in high-parameter and large-capacity power generation field in China
Standard system version for industrial control and production in the electric power industry
softwareRequirements: Phytium processors, China Great Wall servers
